title: About Me
text:
Download Full Resume










2019 - Present




Amazon DSP Delivery Driver | Metropolitan logistics | Sterling, VA August 2022 - December 2022 * Developed good customer service skills through delivering up to 600 packages to customer instructions * Displayed an ability to work and efficiently manage time for up to 10 hours * Enhanced physical fitness through ability to lift packages weighing up to 50 lbs all day * Refined attention to detail by demonstrating highest level of integrity, compliance, and adherence within delivery/transportation services * Honed strong verbal communication skills while working with a team of 15
Delivery Technician | Mountain Hot Tub | Helena, MT September 2021 - December 2021 * Delivered and installed up to 3 hot tubs by working in teams including filling and connecting * Troubleshot onsite problems, offering immediate and long-term solutions
Customer Care and Loyalty Agent | SafeStreetsUSA | Rexburg, ID March 2021 - June 2021 * Resolved calls from national customers while balancing company policies
Service Volunteer | Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints | Tijuana, Baja California March 2021 - June 2021 August 2017 - August 2019




Data Analysis: Excel, Power BI, Python, R
Database Management: MySQL
Other Technical: QuickBooks, Git/GitHub
Soft Skills: Customer Service, Communication, Problem-Solving





Spanish - Intermediate





CompTIA A+





Data Science Society:
Finance Society:
Eagle Scout & Boy Scouts of America
